name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship (CSSS)
description: Merit-based scholarship for college and university students from economically weaker backgrounds.
nextStep: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal with academic records.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Scholarship supporting female students pursuing technical education.
nextStep: Submit application through the AICTE scholarship portal.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
description: Financial assistance for students with disabilities pursuing technical education.
nextStep: Provide disability certificate and academic documents.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Scholarship encouraging talented students to pursue science education.
nextStep: Verify eligibility and apply through the INSPIRE portal.

name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
description: Support for meritorious students from financially weaker families.
nextStep: Apply through NSP with income certificate.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for Minorities
description: Scholarship supporting minority students pursuing higher education.
nextStep: Submit minority certificate and income proof.

name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
description: Support for wards of ex-servicemen and defense personnel.
nextStep: Apply through Kendriya Sainik Board portal.

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students from North-Eastern states.
nextStep: Apply through the UGC scholarship portal.

name: National Fellowship for SC Students
description: Support for Scheduled Caste students pursuing higher studies.
nextStep: Submit caste certificate and academic documents.

name: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
description: Financial support for SC students studying in premier institutions.
nextStep: Verify admission and submit required documents.

name: Top Class Education Scheme for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students studying in quality institutions.
nextStep: Apply through the designated tribal welfare portal.

name: Foundation For Excellence Scholarship
description: Need-based support for engineering and professional degree students.
nextStep: Submit financial documents and academic records.

name: Amazon Future Engineer Scholarship
description: Scholarship supporting students interested in technology careers.
nextStep: Complete scholarship application and academic verification.

name: Google Women Techmakers Scholarship
description: Supports women pursuing computing and technology disciplines.
nextStep: Submit academic achievements and a personal statement.

name: Adobe India Women-in-Technology Scholarship
description: Scholarship supporting women in computer science and engineering.
nextStep: Submit application, academic records, and supporting documents.
